pkgmetadata.longdescription: PLECS Standalone is a block diagram simulator developed by Plexim for high-speed simulations of power electronic circuits and electrical systems. It combines an intuitive schematic editor with a powerful simulation engine and provides specialized libraries for power semiconductors, electrical machines, thermal modeling and control. This package installs the proprietary Linux 64-bit binary distribution; a valid license from Plexim is required at runtime.
PLECS Standalone 是 Plexim 公司开发的电力电子电路与电气系统仿真软件， 提供直观的电路原理图编辑器和高性能仿真引擎，并内置功率半导体、电机、 热模型与控制等专用模型库，可用于电力电子变换器、电机驱动和电网等系统的 快速时域仿真。本包提供 Linux 64 位的二进制分发版，运行时需要 Plexim 提供的有效许可证。
